content:
The values returned by the INDEX&MATCH formulas are text strings instead of numbers. This is why the net exports calculation is failing.

Let me adjust the net exports formula to handle text strings:

```json
{
  "analysis": "The values returned by the INDEX&MATCH formulas are text strings instead of numbers. This is why the net exports calculation is failing. I need to adjust the net exports formula to handle text strings.",
  "plan": "I'll modify the net exports formula to use the VALUE function to convert the text strings to numbers before performing the subtraction and division.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

file_path = 'gdp.xlsx'
wb = load_workbook(file_path)
task_ws = wb['Task']

# Update the net exports formulas to use VALUE function
print("Updating net exports formulas...")
for col in range(8, 13):
    col_letter = chr(64 + col)
    formula = f"=VALUE({col_letter}12)-VALUE({col_letter}19)")
    task_ws[f"{col_letter}36"].value = formula
    print(f"{col_letter}36: {formula}")

# Update the net exports % of GDP formulas
print("\nUpdating net exports % of GDP formulas...")
for col in range(8, 13):
    col_letter = chr(64 + col)
    formula = f"=({col_letter}36)/{col_letter}26*100")
    task_ws[f"{col_letter}37"].value = formula
    print(f"{col_letter}37: {formula}")

wb.save(file_path)
print("\nFormulas updated!")

EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
